title: Fix podman machine on Windows
body:
Fix podman machine on Windows (regression introduced by #14706 )

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body:
Works as expected. Commands now run again.

Before they complained about:

```
C:\Users\gbraad\Downloads\podman-wsl-fedora>podman machine rm
Error: cannot run command "podman machine rm" as root
```
